witnesses.description: A two-dimensional exact-rational l1 triangle inequality witness.
A 2x2 matrix operator bound using the infinity norm and row-sum norm.
Exact values of T0 through T3 at x = 1/2.

checks.claim: The listed finite-dimensional vectors satisfy the l1 triangle inequality.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes the vector sum and all l1 norms exactly.

checks.claim: The listed matrix-vector image satisfies the row-sum/infinity-norm operator bound.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes Ax, the row-sum norm, and the infinity norms exactly.

checks.claim: The listed Chebyshev values at x = 1/2 satisfy the finite recurrence.
checks.notes: The validator checks T0, T1, and every listed recurrence step exactly.

checks.claim: The listed matrix-vector image has infinity norm at most 2.

data.certificate: The resource regression parses the source SMT-LIB artifact, emits UnsatFarkas evidence, and independently checks the certificate.

checks.notes: Exact operator replay computes ||A*x||_infty = 3 and row-sum bound 6, while the malformed row claims the image norm is at most 2; the source QF_LRA artifact isolates that final inequality conflict for Farkas checking.
